---
title: "02_extract"
author: "Vinci Chan"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc_expand: true
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

# 1. Load Package

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(DBI)
library(RSQLite)
library(future)
library(furrr)

source("R/config.R")
source("R/utils_dates.R")
source("R/utils_db.R")
source("R/utils_cusip.R")
```

# 2. Setup

```{r}
plan(multisession)

dates <- make_quarter_tbl(
  start_year    = 1996,
  end_year      = cfg$end_year,
  start_month_day = "0701"
)

qa_dir_02 <- file.path(cfg$qa_dir, "02")
dir.create(qa_dir_02, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

# 3. Functions

## 3.1 Extract biographical info

```{r}
extract.bio <- function(year_qtr) {
  con <- connect_sqlite(year_qtr)
  on.exit(disconnect_sqlite(con))

  # load "compsubm" table as compsubm_table
  compsubm_table <- tbl(con, "compsubm") %>% as_tibble()

  # function to retreive biographical info
  get.header.value <- function(lines, pattern) {
    out <- lines[grepl(pattern, lines)] %>% 
      gsub("\\t", "", x = .) %>% 
      gsub(pattern, "", x = .)
  
    # ensure length 1 (only one occurence)
    if (length(out) == 0L) {
      NA_character_
    } else {
      out[[1L]]
    }
  }

  # get form type, rdate, fdate using get.header.value
  header_table <- compsubm_table %>% 
    mutate(lines = strsplit(COMLSUBFILE, "\n")) %>% 
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      form = get.header.value(lines, "CONFORMED SUBMISSION TYPE:"),
      cik = get.header.value(lines, "CENTRAL INDEX KEY:"),
      cikname = get.header.value(lines, "COMPANY CONFORMED NAME:"),
      rdate = ymd(get.header.value(lines, "CONFORMED PERIOD OF REPORT:")),
      fdate = ymd(get.header.value(lines, "FILED AS OF DATE:"))
    ) %>% 
    select(-COMLSUBFILE, -lines) %>% 
    ungroup()

  # write as new table in the same sqlite file
  dbWriteTable(
    con, 
    name = "header_table",
    value = header_table,
    overwrite = TRUE
  )
}
```

## 3.2 Extract information table

```{r}
clean.block <- function(
    x, 
    use_cusip_join,
    cusip_vec,
    cusip_vec_8,
    cusip_vec_7,
    error.rows
  ) {
    x <- x[nzchar(trimws(x))]

    if (use_cusip_join && length(cusip_vec) > 0) {
      norm_line <- gsub("\\s|-", "", x)
      has_cusip <- vapply(
        norm_line,
        function(xx) {
          n <- nchar(xx)
          if (n < 7) return (FALSE)
          # check 9-char substrings against cusip_vec
          if (n >= 9) {
            s9 <- seq_len(n - 8)
            if (any(substring(xx, s9, s9 + 8) %in% cusip_vec)) return(TRUE)
          }
          # check 8-char substrings against cusip_vec_8
          if (n >= 8) {
            s8 <- seq_len(n - 7)
            if (any(substring(xx, s8, s8 + 7) %in% cusip_vec_8)) return(TRUE)
          }
          # check 7-char substrings against cusip_vec_7
          s7 <- seq_len(n - 6)
          any(substring(xx, s7, s7 + 6) %in% cusip_vec_7)
        },
        FUN.VALUE = logical(1)
      )
    } else {
      has_cusip <- grepl("[0-9A-Z]{7,8}[0-9]?", gsub("\\s|-", "", x), ignore.case = TRUE)
    }

    x <- x[has_cusip]
    x <- x[!grepl(paste0(error.rows, collapse = "|"), x, ignore.case = TRUE)]
    num_chunks <- lengths(regmatches(x, gregexpr("\\d[\\d,\\.]*", x)))
    x[num_chunks >= 3]
  }
```
```{r}
# function to detect info tables
make.holdings <- function(
  lines,
  use_cusip_join,
  cusip_vec,
  cusip_vec_8,
  cusip_vec_7,
  error.rows
) {
  # 1. blank filings
  if (all(!nzchar(trimws(lines)))) return(character(0))

  # 2. XML informationTable (post-2013 May)
  info_start <- grepl("<[^/]*informationTable", lines, ignore.case = TRUE)
  info_end   <- grepl("</[^>]*informationTable", lines, ignore.case = TRUE)
  if (any(info_start) && any(info_end)) {
    start <- which(info_start)[1]
    end   <- rev(which(info_end))[1]
    return(lines[start:end])
  }

  hold <- character(0)

  # 3. ASCII <TABLE> ... </TABLE> block
  table_start <- grep("<TABLE>",  lines, ignore.case = TRUE)
  table_end   <- grep("</TABLE>", lines, ignore.case = TRUE)

  if (length(table_start) > 0L && length(table_end) > 0L) {
    start_tbl <- table_start[1]
    end_tbl   <- table_end[length(table_end)]
    block_tbl <- lines[start_tbl:end_tbl]
    hold_tbl  <- clean.block(
      block_tbl,
      use_cusip_join,
      cusip_vec,
      cusip_vec_8,
      cusip_vec_7,
      error.rows
    )
    if (length(hold_tbl) > 0L) hold <- hold_tbl
    # if length == 0L, we fall through to fallback
  }

  # 4. Fallback if TABLE gave nothing (or no TABLE at all)
  if (length(hold) == 0L) {
    idx_hdr  <- which(grepl("</SEC-HEADER>", lines, ignore.case = TRUE))
    start_fb <- if (length(idx_hdr)) max(idx_hdr) + 1L else 1L
    block_fb <- lines[start_fb:length(lines)]
    hold_fb  <- clean.block(
      block_fb,
      use_cusip_join,
      cusip_vec,
      cusip_vec_8,
      cusip_vec_7,
      error.rows
    )
    hold <- hold_fb
  }

  hold
}
```
```{r}
extract.holdings <- function(year_qtr) {
  con <- connect_sqlite(year_qtr)
  on.exit(disconnect_sqlite(con))

  # decide if we use CUSIP- or regex-filtering for this quarter
  yr <- as.integer(substr(year_qtr, 1, 4))
  use_cusip_join <- (yr >= 1996)

  cusip_vec <- if (use_cusip_join) get.cusip.vec(con, year_qtr) else character(0)
  cusip_vec_8 <- if (length(cusip_vec) > 0) substr(cusip_vec, 1, 8) else character(0)
  cusip_vec_7 <- if (length(cusip_vec) > 0) substr(cusip_vec, 1, 7) else character(0)

  # load "compsubm" table as compsubm_table
  compsubm_table <- tbl(con, "compsubm") %>% 
    as_tibble() %>% 
    mutate(lines = strsplit(COMLSUBFILE, "\n"))

  # common blacklist
  error.rows <- c(
    "<SEC-DOCUMENT>", "<SEC-HEADER>", "ACCESSION NUMBER:",
    "<ACCEPTANCE-DATETIME>", "<FILENAME>", "<phone>", "Phone:",
    "</additionalInformation>", "FORM 13F", "INFORMATION TABLE",
    "SUMMARY PAGE", "RUN DATE", "PAGE",
    "List of Other Managers", "SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION",
    "ITEM ", "ITEM1", "ITEM 1:", "COL ", "COL1", "COLUMN", "Suite", "<DESCRIPTION>"
  )

  use_parallel <- as.integer(year_qtr) < 20132 # future_map() doesn't work on xml files as the files are too big

  message("  Mode: ", if (use_parallel) "parallel (future_map)" else "sequential (map)")

  if (use_parallel) {
    holding_lines <- future_map(
      compsubm_table$lines,
      ~ make.holdings(
        .x,
        use_cusip_join = use_cusip_join,
        cusip_vec      = cusip_vec,
        cusip_vec_8    = cusip_vec_8,
        cusip_vec_7    = cusip_vec_7,
        error.rows     = error.rows
      ),
      .progress = TRUE,
      .options = furrr_options(
        globals = c(
          "make.holdings",
          "clean.block",
          "use_cusip_join",
          "cusip_vec",
          "cusip_vec_8",
          "cusip_vec_7",
          "error.rows"
        )
      )
    )
  } else {
    holding_lines <- map(
      compsubm_table$lines,
      ~ make.holdings(
        .x,
        use_cusip_join = use_cusip_join,
        cusip_vec      = cusip_vec,
        cusip_vec_8    = cusip_vec_8,
        cusip_vec_7    = cusip_vec_7,
        error.rows     = error.rows
      )
    )
  }

  holdings_table_raw <- tibble(
    FILENAME = compsubm_table$FILENAME,
    holding_text = vapply(holding_lines, paste, collapse = "\n", FUN.VALUE = character(1))
  )

  dbWriteTable(
    con, 
    "holdings_table_raw",
    holdings_table_raw,
    overwrite = TRUE
  )
}
```

# 4. Loop all functions

```{r}
for (i in seq_along(dates$year_qtr)) {
  
  yq <- dates$year_qtr[i]

  message(sprintf(
    "\n=== Quarter %d/%d: %s ===",
    i, length(dates$year_qtr), yq
  ))
  start_time <- Sys.time()
  message(start_time)

  message("Running extract.bio for ", yq, "...")
  extract.bio(yq)
  message("Finished extract.bio for ", yq)

  message("Running extract.holdings for ", yq, " (up to 15 minutes)... ")
  extract.holdings(yq)
  message("Finished extract.holdings for ", yq)

  end_time <- Sys.time()
  elapsed <- end_time - start_time

  message(
    sprintf("Total time for %s: %.1f minutes (%.1f seconds)",
            yq, as.numeric(elapsed, units = "mins"),
            as.numeric(elapsed, units = "secs"))
  )
}
```

# 5. Extract summary

```{r}
summarise_extract_quarter <- function(year_qtr) {
  con <- connect_sqlite(year_qtr)
  on.exit(disconnect_sqlite(con), add = TRUE)

  tables <- dbListTables(con)

  if (!"holdings_table_raw" %in% tables) {
    return(tibble(
      year_qtr = year_qtr,
      n_filings = NA_integer_,
      n_empty = NA_integer_
    ))
  }

  out <- dbReadTable(con, "holdings_table_raw") %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    summarise(
      n_filings = n(),
      n_empty = sum(holding_text == "", na.rm = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    mutate(year_qtr = year_qtr, .before = 1)

  out
}
```
```{r}
extract_summary <- map_dfr(dates$year_qtr, summarise_extract_quarter, .progress = TRUE) %>%
  mutate(pct_empty = n_empty / n_filings)

write_csv(extract_summary, file.path(qa_dir_02, "extract_summary.csv"))
```
```{r}
plot_df <- extract_summary %>%
  filter(!is.na(n_filings)) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.integer(substr(year_qtr, 1, 4)),
    qtr  = as.integer(substr(year_qtr, 5, 5)),
    date = yq(paste0(year, " Q", qtr)),
    pct_empty = pct_empty * 100
  )

p_extract_qa <- plot_df %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = date)) +
  geom_line(aes(y = pct_empty, color = "Empty filings (%)")) +
  geom_point(aes(y = pct_empty, color = "Empty filings (%)"), size = 0.6) +
  geom_line(aes(y = n_filings / 100, color = "Total filings")) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    name = "Empty filings (%)",
    sec.axis = sec_axis(~ . * 100, name = "Total filings")
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Empty filings (%)" = "steelblue",
    "Total filings" = "darkorange"
  )) +
  labs(
    x = "Quarter",
    color = NULL,
    title = "Extraction quality vs. number of 13F filings over time"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

ggsave(
  filename = file.path(qa_dir_02, "extract_summary.png"),
  plot     = p_extract_qa,
  width    = 8,
  height   = 4,
  dpi      = 300
)
```

# 6. Inspection

```{r}
#| eval: false

# individual quarter inspection
year_qtr <- 20024
con <- connect_sqlite(year_qtr)

empty_filenames <- tbl(con, "holdings_table_raw") %>% 
  filter(holding_text == "") %>% 
  pull(FILENAME) %>% 
  head(100)

empty_compfilings <- tbl(con, "compsubm") %>% 
  filter(FILENAME %in% empty_filenames) %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  mutate(lines = strsplit(COMLSUBFILE, "\n")) %>% 
  select(-COMLSUBFILE)
empty_compfilings[[1,2]] # toggle row number to view individual complete filings

disconnect_sqlite(con)
rm(con)
```
